title: Ask a social scope question and review cited sources
description: This verifies that a user can ask a social-scope question, receive a grounded answer, and inspect the supporting source references.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat interface
Select the Social scope
Fill in a corpus question about a social theme into the chat input
Submit the question
Verify an answer is displayed with source references
Verify the selected scope remains Social while reviewing the response

title: Ask about André Prévot in biographical scope and inspect recipient sources
description: This verifies that a biographical question about André Prévot returns relevant documents and shows the cited sources in the panel.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat interface
Select the Biographical scope
Fill in a question about André Prévot as a recipient into the chat input
Submit the question
Verify an answer is displayed with biographical source references
Verify document metadata and source details are available in the source panel

title: Search an exact theological term and compare the retrieved sources
description: This verifies that an exact term search for oblação returns lexically relevant evidence with anchored citations and multilingual source support.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat interface
Select the most relevant scope for theological content
Fill in a question containing the exact term oblação into the chat input
Submit the question
Verify an answer is displayed with anchored citations
Verify the cited sources include multilingual or translated material when available

title: Keep scope context after an insufficient-evidence answer
description: This verifies that a Social-scope question with limited evidence produces an honest uncertainty response while preserving the selected scope for continued research.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat interface
Select the Social scope
Fill in a question that is unlikely to have sufficient evidence into the chat input
Submit the question
Verify an honest uncertainty or no-results state is displayed
Verify the Social scope remains selected

title: Switch scope and ask a new question without losing context
description: This verifies that changing between scopes updates retrieval behavior and allows a new question to be asked from the same conversation flow.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat interface
Select one scope
Fill in a first corpus question into the chat input
Submit the question
Select a different scope
Fill in a second corpus question into the chat input
Submit the question
Verify the latest answer reflects the newly selected scope
Verify the conversation remains available for continued research

title: Verify backend connectivity through the health check
description: This verifies that the basic connectivity check endpoint returns a visible successful status used by the interface as a health placeholder.

steps.description: Navigate to the connectivity or diagnostic view of the chat interface
Trigger the backend connectivity check
Verify a successful connectivity state is displayed

title: Review source metadata after receiving a cited answer
description: This verifies that after an answer is generated, the user can open source details and inspect metadata such as authority and language.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat interface
Select a scope
Fill in a corpus question into the chat input
Submit the question
Open the source details panel for one cited item
Verify source metadata is displayed
Verify authority and language information are visible

title: Handle a malformed chat request gracefully
description: This verifies that submitting an incomplete chat request produces a clear validation error and preserves the conversation UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat interface
Select any available scope
Submit the chat form without entering a question
Verify a validation error state is displayed
Verify the chat interface remains usable after the error
